risk_title: Flood Impact on School Infrastructure and Service Delivery
risk_summary: Schools in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa have been affected by floods, disrupting basic infrastructure targets and requiring new data collection. This environmental shock has direct implications for service delivery continuity and project implementation timelines.
evidence_quote: Target achieved for the year but most of the schools are affected by floods, so new data will be collected.

risk_title: Supply Chain Disruptions in Health Services
risk_summary: Delays in the supply chain for essential medicines have caused a decline in PHC facility medicine availability (from 70% to 58%), despite timely budget releases. This indicates systemic vulnerabilities in health service delivery that may be exacerbated by conflict or instability.
evidence_quote: The funds were released by the Finance Department on time but there appears to be a delay in supply chain of essential medicine. Health Department is requested to investigate the reason of fall in availability of medicine.

risk_title: Staffing Gaps in Newly Merged Districts (NMDs)
risk_summary: Girls' schools in NMDs show lower staffing achievement (50%) compared to overall targets (65%), and NMDs have not yet met 100% of performance standards. This suggests governance and capacity challenges in conflict-affected or recently integrated areas.
